string 2:
I heard the Titans were gone, so I came to visit from
Central Town.

Good thing the Titans aren't here, but neither is anyone
else. The village is empty.

It's lonely all by myself... Let's all put on swimsuits and
go swimming in the ocean!

Hey, you're wearing a swimsuit! Are you gonna go swimming?
Are you? Are you?!
Hey, you're wearing a swimsuit! But some of you aren't...

It's no fun being left out. I think everyone should wear a
swimsuit!
{next}Yes, we are.
No, we're not.
No, this is just what I usually wear.
I knew it! You can't fool me!

Even though you're wearing a swimsuit...? That's kinda
weird.

Well, you should wear proper clothes sometimes, too. You
don't wanna catch a cold!

...Can I join you? I'm lonely all by myself, so I wanna tag
along with you to the ocean!
{next}Sure.
{end}Sorry.
Yay! Thank you so much!
Aww... Darn...
Let's go, then!
Whoa... The ocean's so big! And really blue!
Hehe. I can hear the excitement!
I bet you're pretty excited yourself, Aegiomon!
{next}I'm excited, too.
{next}We should do some warmup exercises before swimming.
{next}I see something sinister.
Hee hee. To be honest, so am I!

You're right. There's no one to help us here if someone gets
a leg cramp or something.
Hm? What are you talking about? I don't see anything.
Hey, what's that triangle thing over there?
You're right. There's something over there...
Oh, my gosh! It's coming this way!
{next}Let's get closer.
{end}Let's stay back and see what happens.
But i-if anything happens, you have to protect me, okay?
I agree. We shouldn't get any closer.

Just when Titans finally go... now YOU! This MY
territory...!
Darn...! You be sorry...! Me telling my boss!
Ha! Now you know how strong I am!
Hey... Do you see a bunch of things gathering over there...?
Me hear you not treat our little friend nice!

You must work for the Titans! Well, we won't be so easily
defeated this time!

Wait! This is a misunderstanding...! Oh, no. They won't
listen to us.
Darn! This not over yet!
Let's tell the boss we were attacked!

No need. Seadramon already reported to me that Titans
invaded again.
{next}All we wanna do is have some fun in the ocean...
{next}Do we look like Titans?
{next}Huh?! Titans?! Where?!
You mean have some fun raiding our territory, right?!
I have no idea. So we have to eliminate anyone suspicious.
Stop looking around. I know you're Titans!

Now you're going to get some payback for showing our little
friend a good time!

Damn. We lost... This ocean is yours. Do what you want with
it.
We don't want it. And we're not Titans, either.
...What?
{next}We actually drove the Titans away.
{next}Can we just have a swim real quick?
{next}Do what we want with it? Even, say, boiling it?
So you're the ones who got rid of that Sharkmon...?!

...I guess it's true you're really not here to try and rule
the area...

I did say do what you want, but why boil it?!
Honestly, I don't really sense any ill will in you.

Well, we hope you forgive us for our mistake. I'll tell the
others. Have fun in the ocean.
You guys are so strong! I'm amazed.
Okay, let's play! Prepare to be splashed!
Eek! A surprise attack!
Here comes a toss! Yah!
Tah!
Argh, I missed!
You're doing good. Straight ahead!
A little to the left! Now! Attack!
{next}[Attack to the left.]
{next}[Attack straight ahead.]
{next}[Attack to the right.]
Wow! You did it! Great job!
Aww. It was a little more to the left!
Whoa! That was a close one. It was coming this way!

It's more wobbly than I thought... I have to hold onto it
more firmly.
Here it comes! Get ready for the Big Wave!
Yay! Hahaha!
{next}I got water in my mouth.
{next}I got water in my ears.
{next}I lost my swimwear.

Hee hee. I see that seawater in this world is just as salty
as in our own!

Are you okay? Just tilt your head to the side and tap your
head.
You what?! O-Oh, look! It's floating over there!

It seems like you had a good time! Okay, let's head back to
the station now!
That was super fun! Thanks!
Here... I want you to have this.
See you later!

That swimsuit...! I remember the time we all went down to
the ocean.
That was so much fun!
It's been a while. We had fun that time, didn't we?
